titleStmt.title: SII 4.1334: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1334. (A.R. No. 412 of 1893). ON THE SAME TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ŇõakavarŠĻ£amulu 1028 svasti samastabhuvanńĀŇõraya Ňõrńępritvńęvallabha mahńĀrńĀjńĀdhirńĀja rńĀjaparamńďŇõvara parama
bhaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ńĀraka ravikulatilaka cŇćŠłćakulaŇõńďkhara pńĀŠĻáŠłćyakulńĀŠĻĀtaka samastarńĀjńĀŇõraya rńĀjarńĀjńďŠĻĀdra vńęramahńďŠĻĀdra vikra
macŇćŠłća vijayńĀbharaŠĻáa nijabhujavijitagaŠĻĀggńĀkńĀvńďrńęparyyaŠĻĀtagiridharitrńępati saptamŇćviŠĻ£ŠĻáuvardhanulaina tribhuva
nacakravartti ŇõrńękulŇćttuŠĻĀggacŇćŠłćadńďvara pravarddhamńĀnavijayarńĀjyasaŠĻĀvatsaraŠĻĀbulu 37 gu ŇõrńĀhi dina 338
cŇćŠłćamaŠĻáŠłćalamuna nityavinŇćdavalanńĀŠĻĀŠĻ≠i vennakŇćŠĻ≠amuna kŇęvanŇęri vńďnŇęruŠłćayńĀ vńďlńĀgiriyńĀŠĻáŠłćiyaina rńĀ
jarńĀjamanittarayaŠĻĀŠłću ŇõrńębhńęmńďŇõvaramahńĀdńďvarakuŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina AkhaŠĻáŠłćavartti lŇćhadaŠĻáudiviya 1 ŠĻáŠĻ≠iki nńĀcaŠĻĀdrńĀ
rkkamu neyi sariyiŠĻĀpagalavńĀrugńĀ ŇõrńębhńęmńďŇõvaramahńĀdńďvara kilaramuna prolabŇćla nńĀvayayu kńĀŠĻ≠abŇćyu
mayayu si dńĀmayayu cadukanńĀ kommaya berasina nalvuru bŇćluŠĻĀ bŇęŠĻĀŠĻ≠agńĀ AnnabŇćla nŇęŠĻĀkani vasamu
na viŠłćcina EŠłćlu 50 nityapaŠłći golavaŠĻĀgala tribhuvanńĀŠĻĀkuŇõa nńď mńĀna 1 . likhitaŠĻĀ vńęra rńĀjńďŠĻĀdracŇćŠłća ńÄcaryyaŠł• .
Digital edition of SII 4.1334 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
